game_info.title: Endless Slayer
game_info.concept:
PREPARE FOR THE WORLD’S FIRST ENDLESS ACTION RPG

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/slayin/id548580856

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

PREPARE FOR THE WORLD’S FIRST ENDLESS ACTION RPG

Slayin will test your skills like no other endless game on the App Store. Don’t get yourself fooled by its charming retro graphics and motivating chiptune soundtrack. In this game, death lurks behind every corner!

Your task sounds all so simple. First choose from one of three heroes: knight, wizard and knave. Then slay as many monsters as possible, while leveling up and getting more powerful equipment and spells along the way. But there’s a catch: once you die, you’re gone for good!

On your journey you will travel through numerous locations and encounter dozens  of different monsters and fearsome bosses. Eventually, you will even have to face the giant dragon of legend. But he will not part with his treasure easily. Only the most worthy adventurers will be able to complete this task and become a true hero. Get ready for some slayin!

• World’s first endless action RPG
• Challenging and rewarding
• Pixel perfect retro graphics
• Chiptune soundtrack by Matt Creamer (Retro City Rampage)
• 6 unique playable classes: knight, wizard, knave, archer, tamer and ninja
• Endless loot: tons of weapons, armor and spells
• Face legendary monsters and bosses
• More than a hundred challenging quests to master
• 3 unique game modes
• Compete with your friends on Game Center
game_info.description:
Welcome to ENDLESS SLAYER, a fast-paced action RPG set in a confined arena.
You are a hero tasked with defeating endless waves of monsters.
Choose your class:
- KNIGHT: High durability, powerful melee sword swings.
- WIZARD: Fragile but commands long-range magic missiles.
- KNAVE: Agile rogue who dashes through enemies to strike.

Defeat enemies to gain XP and level up, restoring your health and increasing your power.
Survive as long as you can and defeat the bosses that emerge from the darkness!
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left/Right: Move character / Select Class in menu
- Space: Jump
- Z: Attack (Sword / Shoot / Dash)
- Enter: Start Game / Confirm Selection
- Esc: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Test the KNIGHT class basic movement and survival instincts.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The bot selects the Knight class. During gameplay, it calculates the vector to the nearest enemy and moves away to maintain distance, jumping if an enemy is too close or cornering the player.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should survive for at least 300 frames without taking damage, demonstrating effective evasion logic.

TEST_2.test_description: Test the WIZARD class aggression and projectile system.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot selects the Wizard class. It moves to align horizontally with the nearest enemy and spams the 'Z' key to fire magic missiles, keeping a medium distance.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player should defeat at least 3 enemies within the first 600 frames, verifying projectile collision and damage logic.

TEST_3.test_description: Test the KNAVE class dash mechanic and collision handling.
TEST_3.strategy_description: The bot selects the Knave class. It waits for an enemy to come within close range, then executes a dash attack (Z) towards them.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player should successfully damage enemies using the dash body-hitbox mechanic without taking damage immediately (invincibility frames check).
